purpose: Machine-readable runtime registry for routing authenticated connector apps as domain agents in the DAIOF global multi-platform operating mesh.
last_probe_context: Runtime connector normalization pass. Evidence gathered from live connector probes and branch artifacts.

risk_classes.R4: External, irreversible, financial, production, phone-call, delete, merge, publish, or deploy side effect

health_states.active: Tool succeeds and returns usable data
health_states.active_limited: Tool succeeds for scoped calls but requires strict schema, query, workspace, or platform discipline
health_states.active_empty: Tool succeeds but accessible dataset is empty
health_states.blocked_probe: Probe path was blocked; do not infer platform failure without alternate probe
health_states.unavailable_needs_account: Connector surface exists but account or service setup is missing
health_states.untested: Connector discovered but not probed in this session
health_states.available_tools_discovered: Tool surface discovered through registry but no live identity/data probe executed

agents.routing_role: Canonical engineering memory, code/doc evolution, branch-first audit ledger
agents.governance: Never write to main by default; prefer branch and draft PR; merge is R4.

observed_scope: DAIOF Autonomous Runtime Rollout project created
agents.routing_role: Execution queue and operational work graph
agents.governance: Use for runtime rollout tasks and non-destructive coordination.
Do not route live execution to Linear until reauthenticated.

agents.routing_role: Business memory, CRM, customer and commercial pipeline
agents.governance: Use for business state and CRM operations with scoped objective.
Use for account reads and monetization planning; financial side effects require explicit action target.

agents.routing_role: Design cognition, design-to-code, diagrams, visual planning
agents.governance: Use design reads and generated diagrams as specialist design agent outputs.

agents.routing_role: Visual document and marketing artifact generation
agents.governance: Seed with explicit design objective before use as visual source.
Use as runtime DB after explicit base/table bootstrap.

observed_scope: workspace search works with required filters object
DAIOF Neural Interface and Polling Bridge pages observed
agents.routing_role: Knowledge base, structured memory, Notion bridge, operational docs
agents.governance: Use scoped query discipline; prefer targeted search/fetch before create.

observed_scope: user reader probe blocked by runtime safety path
agents.routing_role: Deployment, preview, hosting, serverless and environment operations
agents.governance: Use alternate safe Netlify operations or explicit project target before deploy routing.
Use before unknown links/domains and deployment URL trust decisions.
Use for capability learning and agent skill mapping.
Use for structured education discovery.

agents.routing_role: Models, datasets, ML docs, Spaces, compute jobs
agents.governance: Use research/search freely; compute jobs need objective and resource boundary.
Do not route meeting-memory tasks until account setup is complete.
Use site listing before build/publish.

observed_scope: AI Architect Command Center project initiated
agents.routing_role: AI app generation and product prototyping
agents.governance: Use for app-surface generation; deployment/publish remains gated by platform state.
Requires real business name and description.
Use form/draft first; sending invoice is high-impact.
Use for domain availability research.

agents.routing_role: Music catalog lookup and playlist enrichment
agents.governance: Use only for music catalog tasks.
Use plan_call before run_call; calls require clear target and purpose.
Use for campaign discovery.
Use only with relevant Dubai utility objective.

agents.routing_role: OpenAI platform setup and API provisioning
agents.governance: Use official setup/encrypted flow for key provisioning.
Use for talent-market search only.

default_route_order: GitHubAgent for canonical engineering memory and governed branch writes
AsanaAgent or LinearAgent for execution graph, with Linear disabled while expired
NotionAgent for scoped operational memory retrieval
AirtableAgent for structured runtime DB after bootstrap
Lovable/Wix/Netlify agents for application and deployment surfaces according to health state
HubSpotAgent and StripeAgent for business and monetization operations
FigmaAgent and CanvaAgent for design artifacts
DataCamp/edX/HuggingFace for learning, research, and model work
global_governance_rule: Route each platform by domain specialty, verified health state, and smallest effective action. Multi-platform orchestration is the operating model; connector invocation is the execution substrate.
